title: Protocol to accompany paper entitled "Pharmacological characterization of crotamine effects on mice hind limb paralysis employing both ex vivo and in vivo assays: insights into the involvement of voltage-gated ion channels in the crotamine action on skelet
steps: Put the mouse to placing them into the experimental box (17.6 ´ 28.7 ´ 12.5 cm) in a brightly lit room for 15 min of adaptation.
After 15 and 30 min, a 10% sucrose solution is squirted on the dorsal coat of mice.
The latency to initiate a grooming behaviour as well as the frequency and the duration of grooming is recorded during 75 minutes the test.
creator: Sunamita Lima
